name: worktree-guard
description: A PreToolUse safety hook that stops the classic git-worktree footgun: when your session is inside a .claude/worktrees/<name>/ worktree, it blocks a Write/Edit/MultiEdit whose path resolves into the parent checkout outside the worktree (the main copy you didn't mean to touch — usually a stray absolute path, but a relative path that escapes the worktree is caught too), while leaving the worktree's own files — and its own git dir, where tools like /dev-kit:ship keep run state — writable. Inert outside a worktree, and fail-open on any error.
